experiments.purpose: Investigate hypothesized Swift compiler overload-resolution failure for typed-Cardinal SLI overloads in ~Copyable Self extension + @inlinable consuming func contexts
experiments.statusDetail: Hypothesis (compiler bug) refuted. Root cause was stale Package.resolved pin in swift-sequence-primitives pointing to cardinal-primitives 4b7a83a (pre-SLI publication 2026-05-12), not a Swift compiler limitation. Fix: swift package update in consumer. Misdiagnosis corrects the 'Dead Ends' section in cardinal-sli-overload-expansion-survey.md.

experiments.purpose: Validate Cardinal.Protocol pattern: nested protocol, Tagged conformance, type-preserving generics
Test whether X.Protocol can be unified into a single generic mechanism (Representable, RepresentedBy, Optic.Iso)
Test associatedtype Domain for same-tag enforcement in cross-type operators, companion types for different return types
